generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current military readiness is slipping. The draft might seem old-fashioned, but in today's uncertain world, it's the only way to ensure we have a truly prepared citizenry. Look at how other nations maintain readiness - we can't afford to be the only ones without this critical safeguard. Our freedom isn't free, and we can't rely on volunteers alone when threats are rising. #NationalSecurity #DraftDebate
